authorized: L2 Windows bridge design / skeleton / fixture-only / static validation

architecture_gray_areas.recommendation: Windows-side bridge skeleton plus WSL allowlist client
architecture_gray_areas.when_to_switch: Switch only if official terminal endpoint is verified with L3/L4 authorization, or if user explicitly re-approves WSL credential custody through CP3 security decision.

architecture_gray_areas.recommendation: Limit L2 API to health, capabilities, and readonly probe request/response skeleton
architecture_gray_areas.when_to_switch: Downgrade to health-only if CP3 rejects readonly skeleton; add real readonly endpoints only after L4 run authorization.

architecture_gray_areas.recommendation: Zero sensitive value retention; future values stay in user-owned Windows local config and are never read by Agent or stored in repo/dialog/logs
architecture_gray_areas.when_to_switch: Pause and request L3 security/runtime authorization if any real sensitive value is needed.

architecture_gray_areas.recommendation: Keep all real runtime behind separate per-run gates
architecture_gray_areas.when_to_switch: Open only the specifically authorized action after meta-po launches and records per-run authorization.

advisor_summary.lane_product: Proceed with skeleton-ready expectations; do not promise real-readonly-verified.
advisor_summary.lane_architecture: Use Windows bridge as the credential/runtime boundary; WSL does not import SDK or hold credentials.
advisor_summary.lane_quality: Fail closed by default; redaction and zero operation counts are mandatory.
advisor_summary.lane_docs_check: CP3 approval and runtime authorization must remain visibly separate.

recommended_hld.summary: Windows bridge service owns future Goldminer SDK interaction; WSL calls explicit allowlist API. Current CR045 only produces skeleton, fixture, static validation, redaction, kill switch, and runbook design.

story_lld_policy_recommendation.title: Windows bridge security boundary and authorization model
WSL client contract and network precheck
Readonly probe allowlist and blocked-first response
Redaction evidence and no-operation static validation
User runbook and L3/L4/L5 follow-up gate
story_lld_policy_recommendation.lld_policy: technical-note; upgrade to full-lld if automatic manifest/schema/guard script is introduced

resume_point.next_action: Generate CP3 HLD consistency precheck and CP3 human Decision Brief from HLD/ADR/discussion inputs.
